description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with palm trees and greenery. The structure features large windows, a spacious open-plan living and dining area with wood flooring, and a visible kitchen. There is an attached carport with a transparent roof, providing covered parking for one vehicle. The backyard includes a green lawn and a patio area with outdoor seating, while the front has a veranda with additional seating. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, attached carport, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the veranda, main entrance, large windows, and attached carport on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, green lawn, and rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the living area windows, side yard, and part of the carport structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and sides
